description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, asymmetrical layout. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes, including a main living area, a poolside section, and a rooftop garden with outdoor seating. The exterior combines white and gray concrete, wood paneling, and large glass windows, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property includes landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, and several outdoor patios and decks, some furnished with tables and lounge chairs. The windows are expansive and arranged irregularly, maximizing natural light and views. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed bungalow with wood, concrete, and glass, featuring a pool, rooftop garden, and multiple patios. The design is open, asymmetrical, and emphasizes outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large pool, and extensive glass facade with a mix of wood and concrete finishes.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rooftop garden, green spaces, and a more private, enclosed section of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Backyard view with visible patios, landscaped garden, and outdoor seating areas extending from the main structure.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the pool, multiple terraces, and the integration of greenery with the building's modern lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
